description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly tapered top. The can is predominantly blue with a large, circular logo on the front featuring a red, white, and blue color scheme, reminiscent of the Pepsi brand. The top of the can is metallic silver with a typical pull-tab opening mechanism. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light in several areas. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear on the can. The can is sealed, and there is no visible indication of its contents.
description: A blue aluminum beverage can with a silver pull-tab top and a large red, white, and blue logo on the front. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible damage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue can with a prominent red, white, and blue circular logo and the silver pull-tab top.
description_view_1: Side view with the blue can body and a partial glimpse of the logo on the left edge; the rest of the can is plain blue.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain blue surface of the can with no visible logo or markings.
description_view_3: Side view with the blue can body and a partial glimpse of the red section of the logo on the right edge.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, circular red, white, and blue logo is present on the front of the can, resembling the Pepsi logo. No other text or branding is visible.
